function.name: file_search
function.description: Search for files within the workspace by name or pattern. Useful for locating files before inspecting them. Do not use overly broad patterns like * or *.* for file search. Be as specific as possible.

message.description: Explanation of why the file search is needed

query.description: File name, path fragment, regex, or glob pattern to search for

path.description: Directory path where the search should start. Use . for the workspace root.
